evidence: Articulation points: module:com.mongodb.AwsCredential, module:com.mongodb.ClusterFixture, module:com.mongodb.ConnectionString, module:com.mongodb.DB, module:com.mongodb.DBObjectCodec
recommendations: Introduce isolation boundaries around bridge nodes and cycle-heavy paths.
summary: Failures in one component easily spread to others, causing cascading outages.
title: Weak Fault Isolation
